---
title: "Spatial Autocorrelation Diagnostics"
format: gfm
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
helper <- if (file.exists("analysis/_analysis_helpers.R")) "analysis/_analysis_helpers.R" else "../_analysis_helpers.R"
source(helper)
```

## Legacy comments

```{r legacy-comments, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_render_legacy_comments("29-geospatial-spatial-autocorrelation-tests.R", caption = "Legacy Chunk 29: Moran's I checks")
```

```{r deviation-note, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_deviation_note("The table below uses the current active panel and geometry. The current p-values are substantively consistent with the legacy conclusion of strong positive spatial autocorrelation, but are not exact legacy parity; that context is documented in `docs/refactor/spatial_diagnostics_context.md`.")
```

## Current targets-backed results

```{r moran, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "public", "spatial_moran_tests.csv"), "Current Moran's I diagnostics")
```
